en: Presented the first results of our Low Resource ML Colab at the Kunumi COLABS meeting in the South of Brazil, alongside Rodrigo C. Barros.
pt: Apresentamos os primeiros resultados do nosso Colab de Low Resource ML no encontro do Kunumi COLABS na região Sul, ao lado de Rodrigo C. Barros.

en: Six papers from our research group accepted at BRACIS 2026. See you in Cuiabá!
pt: Seis artigos do nosso grupo de pesquisa aceitos na BRACIS 2026. Nos vemos em Cuiabá!

en: Two new preprints on arXiv from the Low Resource ML project: inference-time machine unlearning via gated activation redirection, and low-rank adapter initialization via gradient surgery.
pt: Dois novos preprints no arXiv do projeto Low Resource ML: desaprendizado de máquina em tempo de inferência via gated activation redirection e inicialização de adaptadores de baixo posto via gradient surgery.

en: Arthur Bianchessi presented the Bayesian Attention Mechanism paper at ICLR 2026.
pt: Arthur Bianchessi apresentou o artigo Bayesian Attention Mechanism na ICLR 2026.

en: Marco Bochernitsan, Jerusa Finatto, and Vitor Hugo Garcez defended their M.Sc. theses. Vitor stays in the group as a Ph.D. student.
pt: Marco Bochernitsan, Jerusa Finatto e Vitor Hugo Garcez defenderam suas dissertações de mestrado. Vitor continua no grupo como doutorando.

en: New preprint on arXiv: Quantization-Robust LLM Unlearning via Low-Rank Adaptation.
pt: Novo preprint no arXiv: Quantization-Robust LLM Unlearning via Low-Rank Adaptation.

en: Paper accepted at ICLR 2026: Bayesian Attention Mechanism, a probabilistic framework for positional encoding and context length extrapolation.
pt: Artigo aceito na ICLR 2026: Bayesian Attention Mechanism, um framework probabilístico para codificação posicional e extrapolação de janela de contexto.

en: The Low Resource ML project, funded by Kunumi, kicks off. Three research axes: model editing, machine unlearning, and context window extrapolation (2026 to 2028).
pt: Início do projeto Low Resource ML, financiado pela Kunumi. Três eixos de pesquisa: edição de modelos, desaprendizado de máquina e extrapolação de janelas de contexto (2026 a 2028).

en: Two papers at BRACIS 2025: Evaluating Odor Selectivity in α-Synucleinopathy and Inference Time Debiasing Concepts in Diffusion Models.
pt: Dois artigos na BRACIS 2025: Evaluating Odor Selectivity in α-Synucleinopathy e Inference Time Debiasing Concepts in Diffusion Models.

en: Automated Fact-Checking in Brazilian Portuguese presented at STIL 2025, introducing resources and baselines for the misinformation project.
pt: Automated Fact-Checking in Brazilian Portuguese apresentado no STIL 2025, com recursos e baselines do projeto de desinformação.

en: The Misinformation Identification with LLMs project is awarded FAPERGS and CNPq funding (2025 to 2027).
pt: O projeto de Identificação de Desinformação com LLMs recebe financiamento da FAPERGS e do CNPq (2025 a 2027).

en: Fairness in Deep Learning: A Survey on Vision and Language Research published in ACM Computing Surveys.
pt: Fairness in Deep Learning: A Survey on Vision and Language Research publicado na ACM Computing Surveys.
